name: branchbrief
description: Local-first CLI for generating reviewable branch briefs.

scripts.build: tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --strict --types node --rewriteRelativeImportExtensions --outDir dist src/*.ts src/**/*.ts
scripts.typecheck: tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --strict --types node --rewriteRelativeImportExtensions --noEmit src/*.ts src/**/*.ts tests/**/*.ts
scripts.test: node --test tests/cli/*.test.mjs tests/config/*.test.mjs tests/github/*.test.mjs tests/risk/*.test.mjs tests/git/*.test.ts tests/output/*.test.ts tests/verification/*.test.ts tests/integration/*.test.mjs
